recent_projects.name: manimera
recent_projects.summary: Manimera is a Python library that makes creating Manim animations easy and fast. Designed for educators, content creators, and anyone making educational videos, Manimera provides a simple interface to animate mathematical concepts, graphics, and visual explanations without a lot of boilerplate code.
